title: rubus alterniflorus subsp. obvallatus
intro: Rubus alterniflorus subsp. obvallatus, also known as the alternate-leaf blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to eastern Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus alterniflorus subsp. obvallatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various diseases. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
